unexpected.title: Something paused
unexpected.message: We hit a small snag on our side. Give it another try in a moment; we are on it.

network.title: Connection hiccup
network.message: Things are taking a little longer than usual. We are still reaching for the network; try again shortly.

server.title: We are fixing this
server.message: Our servers stumbled for a moment. Please try again in a little bit; we are sorting it out.

not_found.title: This link is not here
not_found.message: We looked everywhere but this link does not exist. Double-check the URL or ask the sender for a fresh one.

page_not_found.title: Nothing here
page_not_found.message: We looked everywhere but this page does not exist. Double-check the URL or head back home.

invalid_link.title: Link format looks off
invalid_link.message: That does not look like a valid claim link. Copy the full URL from your message and try again.

verification.title: Almost there
verification.message: That did not match what we expected. Take another look at your code or contact; we will wait.

quote.title: Quote needs a refresh
quote.message: The network is being a bit stubborn right now. Your funds are safe; try refreshing the quote or another asset.

wallet.title: No worries
wallet.message: That was cancelled in your wallet. We will be here when you are ready to try again.
